codeReview.summary: Time-travel query APIs and broad integration coverage were added as intended, but timestamp parsing has a correctness hole: invalid calendar dates are accepted and normalized instead of returning InvalidTimestamp.

issues.description: iso8601_to_epoch_ms validates day only as 1..=31 and does not validate calendar correctness per month/leap year. Because days_from_civil is arithmetic and normalizes overflow, inputs like 2024-02-31T00:00:00.000Z are silently accepted and mapped to a different real date instead of returning Error::InvalidTimestamp, which can make query_at/query_between return results for an unintended timestamp.

query_between parses from/to but does not guard from >= to. With the current SQL (history overlap + current _valid_from < to), reversed ranges can return current rows even though [from,to) is empty by definition.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature expectations remain inconsistent with the implemented BEFORE-trigger-only history model: feature metadata still expects lifecycle counts that imply INSERT history rows.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission features: /Users/nbbaier/.factory/missions/a6843fe7-f988-4ceb-8688-b6ccd0fc2d2d/features.json:334,341,348 still reference 3 lifecycle entries and mixed-op query_all >=5, while implementation and validation contract use 2 lifecycle history entries under BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture docs are internally contradictory about _cairn_tx_context storage location (temp vs regular table), which can mislead workers implementing transaction/versioning behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/nbbaier/Code/cairn/.factory/library/architecture.md:21,35,39 describe temp table creation/drop, but line 89 states it is a regular system table (NOT temp).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill enforces strict RED-first TDD, but this feature transcript shows implementation edits before adding tests while handoff still marks procedure as followed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires 'Write failing tests first (RED)' in /Users/nbbaier/Code/cairn/.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 1f57ddc0-16c4-48c4-aa45-e77ab7a355ba shows Edit on storage.rs before subsequent test additions.

summary: Reviewed commit 492b2e7 for feature time-travel-queries-and-integration. Coverage and API wiring are substantial, but I found a blocking timestamp-validation correctness defect in iso8601_to_epoch_ms (invalid calendar dates accepted). Report marked fail and written to the requested scrutiny review path.
